command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2CrXQx4C86zrDpC.917a8311ff66 --database nSYM6mnRbxMSZohhqYHu94 --execute 
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'candidate_zone_results' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
id	int
candidatoSequencial	varchar
candidatoNome	varchar
candidatoNomeUrna	varchar
partidoSigla	varchar
uf	varchar
codigoMunicipio	varchar
nomeMunicipio	varchar
numeroZona	varchar
cargo	varchar
ano	smallint
turno	tinyint
totalVotos	bigint
createdAt	timestamp
